title: Settings Custom Swipe Sensor
scenario: Custom Swipe Sensor settings section is present and displays expected configuration on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20 device settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20).
4. Scroll down to locate the "Custom Swipe Sensor" settings section.
5. Verify that the "Custom Swipe Sensor" section is present and visible.
6. Compare each displayed setting and its value against the expected configuration defined in the product documentation.
expected: The Custom Swipe Sensor settings section is present in Device Settings for supported Poly devices (Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 20), and all displayed settings and values match the expected configuration defined in the product documentation.
